japanese: 笑えばいいと思うよ
english: I think you should just laugh.

japanese: 負ける気がしない
english: I don't feel like I can lose.

japanese: オラに元気を分けてくれ!
romaji: Ora ni genki o wakete kure!
english: Lend me your energy!

japanese: 駆逐してやる!この世から一匹残らず!
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world!

japanese: シシシシシ
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30)

japanese: 痛みを伴わない教訓には意味がない
romaji: Itami o tomonawanai kyoukun ni wa imi ga nai
english: A lesson without pain is meaningless. (alt wording 35)

japanese: 我は…アトミック。
english: I am… atomic.

japanese: グララララ
english: Gurararara! (alt wording 31)

japanese: 普通の生活がしたいだけなんだ
romaji: Futsuu no seikatsu ga shitai dake nanda
english: All I want is to live a normal life. (alt wording 40)

japanese: オレ様の美技にブギウギ
english: Dance to my beautiful technique! (alt wording 23) (alt wording 75)

japanese: ほう…向かってくるのか
english: Oh? You're approaching me? (alt wording 3)

japanese: やれやれだぜ…まったく。
english: Good grief... honestly. (alt wording 15) (alt wording 67)

japanese: レロレロレロレロ
english: Lero lero lero lero.

japanese: 促は趣味でヒーローをやっている者だ
romaji: Ore wa shumi de hiiroo o yatte iru mono da
english: I'm just a hero for fun.

japanese: ほう…向かってくるのか
english: Oh? You're approaching me?

japanese: 駆逐してやる!この世から一匹残らず!
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world! (alt wording 36) (alt wording 88)

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2) (alt wording 54)

japanese: ほう…向かってくるのか
english: Oh? You're approaching me? (alt wording 3) (alt wording 55)

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2) (alt wording 54)

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!
english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you! (alt wording 41)

japanese: 守るものがある限り、俺は負けない
romaji: Mamoru mono ga aru kagiri, ore wa makenai
english: As long as I have something to protect, I won't lose. (alt wording 43)

japanese: 背中の傷は剣士の恥だ
romaji: Senaka no kizu wa kenshi no haji da
english: Scars on the back are a swordsman's shame.

japanese: だが…それがいい。
english: But... that's what I like. (alt wording 16) (alt wording 68)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: 何ッ！？
english: What?! (alt wording 19)

japanese: 俺はガンダムだ！
english: I am Gundam!

japanese: このジョルノ・ジョバァーナには夢がある！
romaji: Kono Joruno Jobana ni wa yume ga aru!
english: I, Giorno Giovanna, have a dream! (alt wording 5)

japanese: 俺には敵なんていない
romaji: Ore ni wa teki nante inai
english: I have no enemies

japanese: 貴様ッ！見ているなッ！！
english: You! You're watching me! (alt wording 11)

japanese: 計画通り
english: Just as planned.

japanese: レロレロレロレロ
english: Lero lero lero lero. (alt wording 27)

japanese: 俺は海賊王になる！
romaji: Ore wa kaizoku ou ni naru!
english: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!

japanese: どこにいたって、人は繋がっているのよ
romaji: Doko ni itatte, hito wa tsunagatte iru no yo.
english: No matter where you go, everyone's connected.

japanese: 諦めないってばよ!
english: I never give up, believe it! (alt wording 33)

japanese: 奇跡は諦めない奴の頭上に降ってくるんだよ
romaji: Kiseki wa akiramenai yatsu no zujō ni futte kurun da yo
english: Miracles rain down on the heads of those who never give up!

japanese: 生殺与奪の権を他人に握らせるな!
romaji: Seisatsu yodatsu no ken o tanin ni nigiraseru na!
english: Don't let anyone else take control of your life and death! (alt wording 37)

japanese: 生殺与奪の権を他人に握らせるな!
romaji: Seisatsu yodatsu no ken o tanin ni nigiraseru na!
english: Don't let anyone else take control of your life and death!

japanese: あきらめたらそこで試合終了ですよ…？
romaji: Akirametara soko de shiai shuuryou desu yo...?
english: If you give up, that's the end of the game.

japanese: 僕は新世界の神となる
romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru
english: I will become the god of the new world. (alt wording 44)

japanese: 僕は新世界の神となる
romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru
english: I will become the god of the new world. (alt wording 44)

japanese: おれは人間を超越する！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o chouetsu suru!
english: I will transcend humanity!

japanese: 等価交換。何かを得るには、同等の代価が必要だ
romaji: Toukatsu koukan. Nani ka o eru ni wa, doutou no daika ga hitsuyou da
english: Equivalent exchange. To obtain, something of equal value must be lost.

japanese: 何ッ！？
english: What?!

japanese: まだだ、まだ終わらんよ！
english: Not yet! It's not over yet! (alt wording 22)

japanese: 世界は残酷だ…それでも美しい
romaji: Sekai wa zankoku da... soredemo utsukushii
english: This world is cruel... yet so beautiful. (alt wording 26)

japanese: 俺はガンダムだ！
english: I am Gundam!

quote: People’s lives don’t end when they die. It ends when they lose faith.

japanese: 俺は人間をやめるぞ！ジョジョーーッ！！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o yameru zo! Jojo!!
english: I'm going to stop being human, JoJo! (alt wording 12)

japanese: 次にお前は「やれやれだぜ」と言う！
romaji: Tsugi ni omae wa 'yare yare da ze' to iu!
english: Next you'll say, 'Good grief!'

japanese: 諦めないってばよ!
english: I never give up, believe it! (alt wording 33) (alt wording 85)

japanese: なにィ！？
english: What?! (alt wording 9) (alt wording 61)

japanese: オラに元気を分けてくれ!
romaji: Ora ni genki o wakete kure!
english: Lend me your energy!

japanese: オレ様の美技にブギウギ
english: Dance to my beautiful technique! (alt wording 23) (alt wording 75)

japanese: 痛みを伴わない教訓には意味がない
romaji: Itami o tomonawanai kyoukun ni wa imi ga nai
english: A lesson without pain is meaningless. (alt wording 35) (alt wording 87)

japanese: 明日の問題は明日の俺に任せる
romaji: Ashita no mondai wa ashita no ore ni makaseru
english: I'll leave tomorrow's problems to tomorrow's me.

japanese: オラオラオラオラオラ！
english: Ora ora ora ora ora! (alt wording 8) (alt wording 60)

japanese: シシシシシ
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30)

japanese: さらに向こうへ!プルスウルトラ!
english: Go beyond! Plus Ultra! (alt wording 38)

japanese: 笑えばいいと思うよ
english: I think you should just laugh. (alt wording 24)

romaji: Akirametara soko de shiai shuuryou desu yo...?
english: If you give up, that's the end of the game. (alt wording 21)

japanese: 駆逐してやる!この世から一匹残らず!
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world!

japanese: オレ様の美技にブギウギ
english: Dance to my beautiful technique!

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2)

japanese: 我々一人ひとりに与えられている魂は一つだけです。大切になさい
romaji: Wareware hitorihitori ni ataerarete iru tamashii wa hitotsu dake desu. Taisetsu ni nasai.
english: Each of us is only given one soul. Take good care of yours.

japanese: このジョルノ・ジョバァーナには夢がある！
romaji: Kono Joruno Jobana ni wa yume ga aru!
english: I, Giorno Giovanna, have a dream! (alt wording 5)

english: Mama mama mama. (alt wording 29)
